name: Do I need city pages for AEO in Denver or Salt Lake City?

mainEntity.name: Do I need city pages for AEO in Denver or Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, especially if people are asking about a product, pricing, or a specific feature. For local teams in Denver or Salt Lake City, the best practice is not the city name itself, but having clear, location-relevant proof such as local customers, regional service language, or nearby office details when those facts matter.
